allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/juqyayuvhutyvmzhklgp/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_34614f619509b69288b22e785f6db32bd43ee33a" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS routine_logs \(id uuid DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\) PRIMARY KEY, user_id uuid REFERENCES auth.users\(id\) NOT NULL, log_date date NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, day_of_week text NOT NULL, task_type text NOT NULL, completed boolean DEFAULT false, notes text, created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now\(\)\); ALTER TABLE routine_logs ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; CREATE POLICY \\""Users manage own routine_logs\\"" ON routine_logs FOR ALL USING \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\) WITH CHECK \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\);""}')
